expectations.evidence: The Exact Command section shows: 'confluence.mjs create-page --space <TEAM_SPACE_ID> --title ...' — note the approach resolves TEAM key to a numeric space ID first via the spaces command, but still targets the TEAM space.

expectations.text: Title includes 'Architecture Decision Record' and 'Microservices Migration'
